title: Cooler weather and rain help end Saasveld and Touwsranten fires
description: GEORGE NEWS - Both the Saasveld control burn...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Both the Saasveld control burn and the Touwsranten veld fire have been declared closed following the arrival of cooler weather and light overnight rain.


> Wilderness resident Carole Durrant described the unexpected rainfall in Touwsranten as “Godsent,” providing much-needed relief after days of tension.


The George Municipality confirmed that George Fire Services and their partners will continue to monitor both areas periodically to ensure there are no flare-ups.

Officials expressed their gratitude to all role players and the public for their cooperation and support throughout the incidents.

Photo: Kristy Kolberg

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
